display_information.name: Nurture Collective Dev
display_information.description: Intake & conversion notifications for The Nesting Place / Nurture Collective (dev)
display_information.long_description:
Posts lead, intake, and booking notifications from the Nurture Collective platform to your dev Slack channels. Maps to the Client Intake & Conversion Process Flow (new leads, intake completed, consult booked, CRM status updates).

Dev-only — use separate app + channels for production.
